CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, original String);
SELECT splitByString(', ', original) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT splitByString(',,', original) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT splitByString('', original) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT splitByString('::', original) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4;
SELECT splitByString(',', original) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 5;
SELECT id, splitByString(', ', original, 2) AS substrings FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, splitByString(' ', original) AS substrings FROM test_strings WHERE original LIKE '% %';
SELECT id, splitByString('', original) FROM test_strings WHERE original = '';
SELECT id, splitByString('::', original) FROM test_strings WHERE original LIKE 'split::%';
SELECT id, splitByString(', ', original, 3) FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE arrayJoin(splitByString(', ', original)) = '2';
